name: Tri Guy Treasures, Estate Sales & Auctions
description_short: Tri Guy Treasures specializes in estate sales and auctions, liquidating personal property and collectibles for clients seeking maximum value with minimal stress.
description_long:
Tri Guy Treasures is an estate sales and auction company based in the Dallas-Fort Worth area (817 area code) that manages the complete liquidation process for individuals downsizing, settling estates, or clearing property. The company positions itself as a full-service solution handling every phase from initial consultation through final settlement, with a stated track record of $988,000 raised across 46 estates and 97 total projects.

The company offers estate sale management, item cataloging and organization, advertising and marketing for sales, in-person and online auction services, gold and silver buying, and property cleanout services. They handle antiques, collectibles, jewelry, watches, furniture, home décor, tools, electronics, and vehicles. Their stated process involves three steps: free in-person or virtual consultation, complete management of the sale event, and settlement within 14 days with detailed financial breakdown.

Tri Guy Treasures distinguishes itself through claims of 100% satisfaction rates, professional licensing and insurance, and customized solutions tailored to individual estate needs. The company emphasizes personalized service during what they acknowledge as difficult life transitions, offering both traditional estate sale events and online auction options to reach different buyer audiences.

A significant limitation is that the website contains substantial placeholder content (Lorem ipsum text) in multiple sections, including testimonials, service descriptions, and educational content. While core service descriptions are present, the incomplete website presentation raises questions about the company's current operational status and professionalism. Verifiable third-party reviews or licensing documentation are not provided on the site.
address: 5758 Park Vista Cir Ste 108, Fort Worth, TX 76244

company_info.headquarters: 5758 Park Vista Cir Ste 108, Fort Worth, TX 76244

pros: Handles complete estate sale process from consultation through settlement, eliminating client stress
Claims 100% satisfaction rate regarding funds generated for clients
Licensed and insured team with years of stated experience in estate liquidation
Offers both traditional in-person estate sales and online auction options
Provides free initial consultation (in-person or virtual)
Accepts diverse item types including vehicles, antiques, jewelry, and household goods
Promises 14-day settlement timeline with detailed financial breakdown
cons: Website contains extensive placeholder Lorem ipsum text in testimonials, service sections, and content areas, suggesting incomplete or outdated website
No verifiable third-party reviews, ratings, or licensing verification visible on website
Testimonials use generic names with identical placeholder Lorem ipsum text rather than substantive client feedback
No clear fee structure or commission rates disclosed on website
Metrics on homepage lack context (88+ and 100M metrics are unexplained with placeholder descriptions)
best_for: Estate executors and heirs managing liquidation of large property collections
Seniors downsizing homes and seeking professional handling of multi-item sales
Individuals with antiques, collectibles, or specialty items requiring expert appraisal and targeted marketing
diagnosis: Best for estate executors, heirs, and downsizing seniors who need comprehensive liquidation services and prefer delegating the entire sale process to professionals. Primary caveat: significant website incompleteness with placeholder content and lack of verifiable third-party credibility indicators should prompt caller verification of licensing, references, and fee structure before engagement.
services: Full estate sale management and coordination
Antiques and collectibles appraisal and sales
